summary: Iteration 7 tests QR-fallback + shared-hook refactor on PrintInterceptBlock. All 15 tests on paid-preview variant PASS and all 6 anonymous-variant tests PASS. Shared hook useNominate.js is imported by both NominateReaderBlock and PrintInterceptBlock (grep verified). ESLint clean on all 3 target files. @page rule preserved. Screen-side NominateReaderBlock could not be exercised through the preview URL because ArticleMockup.js gates it on `canAccessPremium` (real auth) rather than `isMember` (preview-inclusive) — this is by design and iteration_6 already covered the hook logic via the print variant, which shares the same submit/validation code path.
critical_code_review_comments: useNominate.js is now the SINGLE source of truth for both nominate surfaces — clean separation, no drift possible. Good refactor.

PrintInterceptBlock.js still creates the portal node in render body (line 46-54) with the guard from iteration_6 — same low-priority note applies (would be more idiomatic in useLayoutEffect, but idempotent-by-id lookup makes it safe).
Portal node #tsop-print-portal is never removed on unmount — still a minor leak risk if many ArticleMockup routes mount/unmount in a long session. Low priority.
handleSubmit in useNominate.js swallows fetch errors and always sets submitted=true (fail-open by design per comment) — acceptable given Apps Script webhook queue.

ArticleMockup.js line 222 gates on-screen NominateReaderBlock via `canAccessPremium` while the print block uses `isMember` (includes ?preview=member). Consider aligning these (either both use isMember for consistent preview behaviour, or add a note) — makes preview-mode testing of the on-screen block harder. Minor.
QRCodeSVG data-testid="print-qr" — qrcode.react passes unknown props through to the root <svg>, verified rendered as SVG with 104x104 dimensions.
test_credentials: N/A — ?preview=member query string used to simulate paid subscriber path
context_for_next_testing_agent: PrintInterceptBlock at /app/frontend/src/components/PrintInterceptBlock.js and shared hook at /app/frontend/src/hooks/useNominate.js are verified. Chrome print emulation via page.emulate_media(media='print'); Safari/Firefox simulation via document.documentElement.classList.add('tsop-printing'). Form posts to /api/nominations/submit with 6 keys (subscriber_ghost_id, subscriber_name, subscriber_email, nominee_name, nominee_email, nominee_context). QR renders as SVG (qrcode.react QRCodeSVG) at 104x104 with value = https://www.stateofplay.club/{slug}?ref=print. QR + URL fallback block (data-testid='print-fallback-block') appears for BOTH paid and anonymous variants. On-screen NominateReaderBlock is gated on canAccessPremium (real auth) not isMember, so preview-mode cannot exercise it directly — the hook's logic is still verified indirectly via the print variant which shares the same useNominate hook.

paid_variant_print_block.print_form_tags: PASS (name=INPUT, email=INPUT, context=TEXTAREA — real DOM elements, not svg/img/canvas)
paid_variant_print_block.print_field_borders: PASS (all 3 fields: 1px solid rgb(26,26,26) border, rgb(255,255,255) bg in print media)
paid_variant_print_block.print_fallback_after_form: PASS (fallback block DOM position follows the form)
paid_variant_print_block.print_validation_empty: PASS (error = 'Please enter the nominee’s name.' — matches useNominate hook)
paid_variant_print_block.print_submit_6_keys: PASS (exactly: subscriber_ghost_id, subscriber_name, subscriber_email, nominee_name, nominee_email, nominee_context)
paid_variant_print_block.print_success_ui: PASS ('Sent. Print Nominee will receive the full story shortly — straight from us.')
paid_variant_print_block.at_page_rule: PASS ('@page { margin: 0px; size: a4; }' in stylesheet)
paid_variant_print_block.screen_qr_hidden: PASS (QR ancestor .tsop-print-only is display:none on screen)
paid_variant_print_block.tsop_printing_class: PASS (root display=none, block display=flex when html.tsop-printing is added — Safari/Firefox path works)

test_results_detail.lint: PASS — ESLint zero warnings on PrintInterceptBlock.js, NominateReaderBlock.js, useNominate.js
test_results_detail.screen_nominate_reader_block: SKIPPED — ArticleMockup.js gates NRB on canAccessPremium (real auth) rather than isMember. ?preview=member does not render NRB. Shared hook logic is verified via print variant.
